# The World Brain H.G. Wells nwo illuminati freemasons

Creator: 
Date: 
Downloads: 5193
Subjects: fritz springmeier, HAARP Angels, Christina Stoddard, freemasons, illuminati

The internet is probably the world brain, it's being used as a feedback and information store for some kind of AI computer to rule over us slaves for the elite in the future, they won't have to bother with us in their towers just as long as we produce what robots etc can't in a timely manner and acceptable quality. Only when they need amusement in sick and twisted forms will they need slaves, not unlike gladitorial games but in all sorts of other vile rituals etc I could imagine another part being the NSA's Echelon total electronic surveillance network, which can intercept voice traffic anywhere it's spoke via satellite manipulation of nearby electronics with microphones, that's a decades old program btw The all seeing eye of lucifer.
